reviews.comment:
Rápida y muy cordial atención de los playeros. Los baños impecables, muy limpios en el momento.  Mucha gente de pasada en tours turisticos. El servicompras un poco chico para la cantidad de gente que había en el momento de la visita.

(Translated by Google)
The beach attendants were quick and very friendly. The restrooms were spotless and very clean at the time. There were many people passing through on tourist tours. The convenience store was a bit small for the number of people there at the time of our visit.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14840228736131746142/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCaVkzU3l3RRAB
